original_query: select s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey, p_mfgr, s_address, s_phone, s_comment from part, supplier, partsupp, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and p_size = 46 and p_type like '%NICKEL' and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'ASIA' and ps_supplycost = ( select min(ps_supplycost) from partsupp, supplier, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'ASIA' ) order by s_acctbal desc, n_name, s_name, p_partkey limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH asia_nations AS (
    SELECT n_nationkey, n_name
    FROM nation
    JOIN region ON nation.n_regionkey = region.r_regionkey
    WHERE region.r_name = 'ASIA'
),
min_costs AS (
    SELECT 
        ps_partkey, 
        MIN(ps_supplycost) AS min_supplycost
    FROM 
        partsupp
        JOIN supplier ON partsupp.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
    WHERE 
        supplier.s_nationkey IN (SELECT n_nationkey FROM asia_nations)
    GROUP BY 
        ps_partkey
)
SELECT 
    s_acctbal, 
    s_name, 
    an.n_name, 
    p_partkey, 
    p_mfgr, 
    s_address, 
    s_phone, 
    s_comment
FROM 
    part
    JOIN partsupp ON part.p_partkey = partsupp.ps_partkey
    JOIN min_costs ON 
        part.p_partkey = min_costs.ps_partkey AND 
        partsupp.ps_supplycost = min_costs.min_supplycost
    JOIN supplier ON partsupp.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
    JOIN asia_nations an ON supplier.s_nationkey = an.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    part.p_size = 46 
    AND part.p_type LIKE '%NICKEL'
ORDER BY 
    s_acctbal DESC, 
    an.n_name, 
    s_name, 
    p_partkey
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replaced correlated subquery with CTEs to avoid repeated execution
Created asia_nations CTE to avoid joining region table twice
Used explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and optimization
